nodes.speaker: Lauren
nodes.text: I am the chief water quality engineer of the Fae. The Fount is choking. The water that feeds the world is turning to sludge...

nodes.speaker: Lauren
nodes.text: Good. I'll unseal the depths now. Follow the upper channel and find the source of the corruption.

nodes.speaker: Lauren
nodes.text: The flow is restored and the corruption is gone. Thank you, travelers. Tell the queen the Fount is clear and the source has been purged.
